sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = strptime('04/15/2023 14:30:00', ['%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S']) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time = strptime('15/04/2023 10:56:00', ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S']);
DELETE FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time < strptime('01/01/2023 00:00:00', ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S']);
